items.name: DeepScript
items.description: Ever wanted to make a real OS from scratch but never wanted to use Linux as a base? Do you also hate using assembly? If you are here and reading this, it's your lucky day, because you just discovered a new coding language I created as a low level language, but with the easiest and most understanding syntax yet!
